description: BTC halving cuts block reward 50% every ~210,000 blocks (~4 years). Historically creates supply shock → price appreciation 12-18 months post-halving. The halving IS the clock of the crypto cycle. Everything else (altseason, retail FOMO, blow-off top) derives from this.

phases.name: accumulation
phases.description: Post-FTX bottom through halving. Smart money accumulates. Boring, range-bound.
phases.implication: DCA steadily. Build position. No leverage.

phases.name: early_bull
phases.description: Post-halving supply shock building. Institutions enter. Spot ETF flows. Price discovers new range.
phases.implication: Hold and add dips. Leverage 1-2x only. Don't sell.

phases.name: mid_bull
phases.description: Bull market acceleration. Retail entering. Altcoins start to move. Narrative shifts to mainstream.
phases.implication: Full position. Ride the trend. Begin watching for euphoria signals. Take some oil profits into BTC if thesis allows.

phases.name: late_bull_euphoria
phases.description: WE ARE APPROXIMATELY HERE. Peak euphoria zone historically. Blow-off top risk. Altcoin mania. Everyone is a genius. BUT this cycle may extend due to debt monetization thesis (Bessent/Lutnick). If fiscal dominance continues (war spending, deficit expansion), BTC may not top here — it becomes a monetary hedge not a speculation.
phases.implication: CRITICAL PHASE. Traditional cycle says prepare for top. BUT macro thesis says this time might extend. Watch for: declining new addresses, funding rate >0.1%/8h sustained, retail leverage >50% of OI. Power law model gives fair value — trade deviations from it. DON'T sell the whole position — keep 50% minimum through potential extension.

phases.name: distribution
phases.description: If cycle is normal: distribution phase. Smart money selling to retail. Lower highs begin. If debt monetization extends cycle: this phase may be delayed 6-12 months.
phases.implication: Reduce leverage to 1x max. Tighten stops. Take profits on bounces. Watch for failed new highs.

phases.name: bear_market
phases.description: If cycle follows historical pattern. 70-80% drawdown from top typical. Long, painful, boring.
phases.implication: DCA back in near bottom. No leverage. Accumulate for next cycle.

key_insight: The BTC cycle IS a derivative of the global credit cycle. Halving tightens supply on a schedule. But demand is driven by global liquidity. When central banks are expanding balance sheets (2020-2021, potentially 2025-2026 via war spending/deficit), the demand side amplifies the supply shock. When central banks are tightening (2022-2023), the supply shock doesn't matter — demand collapse overwhelms it. Understanding WHERE in the credit cycle we are is as important as WHERE in the halving cycle.
current_note: March 2026: late_bull_euphoria phase by historical analog. BUT the Bessent/Lutnick debt monetization thesis + Iran war spending may EXTEND this phase. The 1970s analog suggests commodity/hard asset bull runs can last 5-7 years when governments are actively debasing currency through war spending. This is NOT the normal crypto cycle — the macro overlay may dominate the halving signal.
